channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: DDoS Defense
item.description: Learn effective DDoS defense strategies to protect your website from cyber threats.

item.title: AI Meets Edge
item.description: Unlock Edge AI potential: learn how AI enhances Edge Computing for faster, smarter decisions.

item.title: React Done Right
item.description: Master React with expert best practices and patterns for scalable, efficient apps.

item.description: Optimize WebAssembly performance with expert tips and tricks.

item.title: Agile Done Right
item.description: Master Agile development with expert tips and best practices.

item.title: CYBER 101
item.description: Learn cybersecurity basics & protect yourself online with CYBER 101

item.title: Doc Right
item.description: Improve workflow with expert documentation tips and best practices in 'Doc Right' blog post.

item.title: Secure Containers
item.description: Learn container security best practices to protect your apps and data.

item.title: Design Smart
item.description: Learn to craft effective recommender systems with Design Smart, expert guide to personalized user experiences.

item.title: AutoML: Streamline MLOps
item.description: Simplify MLOps with AutoML. Learn how to automate ML pipelines and boost efficiency.

item.title: Code Together
item.description: Boost coding skills with pair programming techniques & best practices in our 'Code Together' guide.

item.title: GitOps Done Right
item.description: Simplify workflow management with GitOps best practices and expert implementation tips.

item.title: LLM Hacks
item.description: Unlock LLM potential with expert prompt engineering hacks and techniques.

item.title: DW Simplified
item.description: Simplify data management with our expert DW solutions, boosting insights and efficiency.

item.title: Secure Code
item.description: Learn how SAST & DAST secure your code with expert app security testing tips.

item.title: Optimize Images
item.description: Boost site speed with expert image optimization techniques.

item.title: Data Lake 101
item.description: Learn Data Lake basics & architecture in our introductory guide.

item.description: Learn smart contract dev best practices & build secure blockchain apps

item.description: Unlock data potential with Delta Lake & Data Lakehouse. Learn how to simplify data management & analytics.

item.description: Detect unusual patterns with ML anomaly detection techniques.
